title: astragalus abadehensis
intro: Astragalus abadehensis, also known as Abadeh milkvetch, is a type of perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the legume family (Fabaceae). It is native to Iran and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus abadehensis include boosting the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus abadehensis is typically prepared as a herbal tea or supplement, and it can also be found in various traditional medicine preparations, such as infusions and tinctures.
